actions.detail: security requirements defined | security roles defined | secure toolchain | threat modeled | security review | artifact signed | provenance recorded | release archived | security tested | vuln analysis

policies.name: ssdf_po_roles_defined
policies.description: Roles and responsibilities for the secure development process are defined (PO.2).

policies.name: ssdf_po_security_requirements_defined
policies.description: Security requirements for the software and its development are defined (PO.1).

policies.name: ssdf_po_toolchain_secured
policies.description: Supporting toolchains and development environments are configured to improve security (PO.3).

policies.name: ssdf_ps_provenance_recorded
policies.description: Provenance data (e.g. an SBOM) for each release is recorded (PS.3).

policies.name: ssdf_ps_release_archived
policies.description: Each release and its associated files are archived and protected (PS.1/PS.3).

policies.name: ssdf_ps_release_signed
policies.description: Each software release is integrity-protected (e.g. cryptographically signed) against tampering (PS.2).

policies.name: ssdf_pw_no_open_vuln_at_release
policies.description: No known unaddressed vulnerability remains open at release.

policies.name: ssdf_pw_secure_defaults
policies.description: Software is configured with secure default settings (PW.9).

policies.name: ssdf_pw_security_review
policies.description: Code is reviewed and/or analyzed for security before it is accepted (PW.7/PW.8).

policies.name: ssdf_pw_security_tested
policies.description: Executable code is security-tested before release (PW.8).

policies.name: ssdf_pw_threat_modeled
policies.description: The design is reviewed against security requirements and threats (threat modeling) (PW.1/PW.2).

policies.name: ssdf_rv_root_cause_analysis
policies.description: Root-cause analysis is performed to reduce the frequency of future vulnerabilities (RV.3).

policies.name: ssdf_rv_vulnerability_analysis
policies.description: Releases are continuously analyzed to identify vulnerabilities (RV.1).

policies.name: ssdf_rv_vulnerability_remediated
policies.description: Each identified vulnerability is assessed and remediated or mitigated (RV.2).
